nasb.text: And it will be that every soul that does not heed that prophet shall be utterly destroyed from among the people.’

esv.text: And it shall be that every soul who does not listen to that prophet shall be destroyed from the people.’

cnv.text: 無論誰不聽從那位先知，必定從民中滅絕。’

ccb.text: 凡不听的，必将他从民中铲除。’

csbs.text: 所有不听从那位先知的人，都要从民中被全然灭绝。’
